parameters.query: SELECT 'S' AS _rt, item_code, item_name, foreign_name, item_group, uom, whs_code, whs_name, COALESCE(bin_code,'') AS bin_code, COALESCE(batch_number,'') AS batch_number, SUM(on_hand) AS qty, AVG(avg_price) AS avg_price, SUM(stock_value) AS stock_value, MAX(total_on_hand) AS total_on_hand, MAX(committed_qty) AS committed_qty, MAX(ordered_qty) AS ordered_qty, MAX(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date FROM wms.wms_stock_snapshot WHERE company_code = $1 AND snapshot_date = (SELECT MAX(s2.snapshot_date) FROM wms.wms_stock_snapshot s2 WHERE s2.company_code = $1) AND ($2 = '' OR item_code = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR whs_code = $3) AND ($4 = '' OR bin_code = $4) AND on_hand > 0 GROUP BY item_code, item_name, foreign_name, item_group, uom, whs_code, whs_name, bin_code, batch_number UNION ALL SELECT 'D' AS _rt, item_code, MAX(COALESCE(item_name,'')) AS item_name, '' AS foreign_name, '' AS item_group, '' AS uom, warehouse_code AS whs_code, '' AS whs_name, COALESCE(bin_location,'') AS bin_code, COALESCE(batch_number,'') AS batch_number, SUM(CASE WHEN action IN ('receipt','count') THEN quantity WHEN action IN ('scan','issue') THEN -quantity ELSE 0 END) AS qty, 0 AS avg_price, 0 AS stock_value, 0 AS total_on_hand, 0 AS committed_qty, 0 AS ordered_qty, NULL AS snapshot_date FROM wms.wms_transactions WHERE (posted_flag=FALSE OR posted_flag IS NULL) AND action!='move' AND company_code = $1 AND ($2 = '' OR item_code = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR warehouse_code = $3) GROUP BY item_code, warehouse_code, COALESCE(bin_location,''), COALESCE(batch_number,'') UNION ALL SELECT 'D' AS _rt, item_code, MAX(COALESCE(item_name,'')) AS item_name, '' AS foreign_name, '' AS item_group, '' AS uom, warehouse_code AS whs_code, '' AS whs_name, COALESCE(bin_location,'') AS bin_code, COALESCE(batch_number,'') AS batch_number, SUM(quantity) AS qty, 0 AS avg_price, 0 AS stock_value, 0 AS total_on_hand, 0 AS committed_qty, 0 AS ordered_qty, NULL AS snapshot_date FROM wms.wms_transactions WHERE (posted_flag=FALSE OR posted_flag IS NULL) AND action='move' AND company_code = $1 AND ($2 = '' OR item_code = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR warehouse_code = $3) GROUP BY item_code, warehouse_code, COALESCE(bin_location,''), COALESCE(batch_number,'') UNION ALL SELECT 'D' AS _rt, item_code, MAX(COALESCE(item_name,'')) AS item_name, '' AS foreign_name, '' AS item_group, '' AS uom, COALESCE(from_warehouse, warehouse_code) AS whs_code, '' AS whs_name, COALESCE(from_bin,'') AS bin_code, COALESCE(batch_number,'') AS batch_number, SUM(-quantity) AS qty, 0 AS avg_price, 0 AS stock_value, 0 AS total_on_hand, 0 AS committed_qty, 0 AS ordered_qty, NULL AS snapshot_date FROM wms.wms_transactions WHERE (posted_flag=FALSE OR posted_flag IS NULL) AND action='move' AND company_code = $1 AND ($2 = '' OR item_code = $2) AND ($3 = '' OR (from_warehouse = $3 OR (from_warehouse IS NULL AND warehouse_code = $3))) GROUP BY item_code, COALESCE(from_warehouse, warehouse_code), COALESCE(from_bin,''), COALESCE(batch_number,'') ORDER BY item_code, whs_code, bin_code
